about.title: Your home, expertly cared for.
about.sub: We connect you with skilled professionals who deliver high-quality home services right at your doorstep — simple, fast, and reliable.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: To simplify everyday living by providing dependable, high-quality home services through technology and trusted professionals.

sections.title: Our Vision
sections.content: Becoming the most trusted home services platform — known for reliability, convenience, and customer satisfaction.

sections.title: Our Commitment
sections.content: Whether it's a small task or a major service, HomeHero ensures professionalism, safety, and satisfaction at every step.

privacy.sub: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use the HomeHero platform and services.

items.title: Background & Applicability
items.content: This Policy applies to all users of HomeHero services. By using our services, you agree to this Policy. We are not responsible for third-party websites linked on our Platform.

items.title: Personal Data We Collect
bullets: Contact Data — name, email, phone, address
Profile Data — username, photos, profile details
Communication Data — messages, feedback, chat records
Technical Data — IP address, browser, device, usage logs
Transaction Data — payment details via secure third parties
Usage Data — booking history, clicks, preferences

items.title: How We Collect Data
bullets: Direct input — account creation, bookings, support queries
Automated tools — cookies, analytics, tracking technologies
Third parties — payment processors, analytics providers

items.title: Cookies
items.content: We use cookies to improve user experience, remember preferences, and analyse traffic. You can disable cookies via your browser settings.

items.title: Sharing Your Data
items.content: We share data with service professionals, trusted vendors, and legal authorities when required.
items.highlight: We do not sell your personal data.

items.title: Account Deletion
items.content: Request deletion of your account and data by emailing us. Processing may take up to 7 working days.

items.title: Data Security
items.content: We use encryption, secure servers, and access controls. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials safe.

items.title: Data Retention
items.content: We retain data as long as necessary to provide services and meet legal obligations.

items.title: Business Transfers
items.content: In case of a merger or acquisition, your data may be transferred as part of business assets.

items.title: Policy Updates
items.content: We may update this Policy. Continued use of our services means you accept the updated Policy.

terms.sub: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using the HomeHero platform and services.

items.title: Acceptance of Terms
items.content: By accessing or using HomeHero, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you may not use our services.

items.title: Service Description
items.content: HomeHero provides a platform to connect customers with service professionals for various home services.

items.title: Booking & Payments
items.content: Bookings are subject to availability. Payments must be made through our secure payment gateway or as specified for the service.

items.title: Cancellations & Refunds
items.content: Cancellation policies vary by service. Please refer to the specific service details for cancellation and refund terms.

items.title: Limitation of Liability
items.content: HomeHero is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

items.title: Governing Law
items.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where HomeHero operates.

referral.title: Invite Friends, Earn Rewards!
referral.sub: Share the HomeHero experience with your friends and you both get ₹50 credit when they complete their first booking.

steps.title: Share your code
steps.content: Send your unique referral code to your friends via WhatsApp or other social media.

steps.title: Friend signs up
steps.content: Your friend uses your code while signing up on the HomeHero app.

steps.title: Both get ₹50
steps.content: Once your friend completes their first service booking, ₹50 will be credited to both of your accounts.

terms: Referral bonus is only applicable for new users.
Bonus will be credited after the referred friend's first booking is completed.
Self-referrals are not allowed and will result in disqualification.
HomeHero reserves the right to modify or terminate the program at any time.
